ddt:Target.Name: ADAS Insulator V9
ddt:Target.Description:
Pièce : ADAS Insulator Fonction : Isolateur électronique entre le CAN V et le CAN ADAS.
Andrei NITA ASSYSTEM andrei.nita-renexter@renault.com Tel : +40 21 539 0287
jean-francois.camart@renault.com
******************** HISTORY ********************
Novembre 2011 : V1.0 creation
De novembre à décembre : Mise à jour de la base (V2.0, V3.0, V4.0, V5.0)
Fin décembre 2011 : Base V6.0 non officialisé mais envoyé au personne du diag pour vérification
12 avril 2012 : Officialisation de la base V6.1 en base centrale (évolution par rapport à la V6.0 : ajout "Date d'officialisation de la base")
17 septembre 2012 : V6.3 : Mise à jour de la base pour soft V2.00 + remarques du tracklist de Yacine El Ghouch
10 octobre 2012 : V6.3 : Demande d'officialisation en base centrale.
10 janvier 2012 : V6.4 : Suppression du DTC "Virgin Configuration" $9341 à la demande Yacine EL GHOUCH PFE Diagnostique Edison. En effet ce DTC, bien qu'existant dans l'ECU, n'a pas à apparaitre en usine. C'est le Fournisseur qui fait la config (config par defaut 0b00000011 => 2E AC 1D 03) de la pièce avant envoi en usine Renault. Mise à jour des ecrans. Demande d'officialisation en base centrale.
3 juillet 2013 : V6.5 : Demande d'officialisation en base centrale.
12 novembre 2013: V6.6 : Modification de requete $21 82 MaJ SW v3.0
29 January 2014: V6.7 : Auto-Ident Update
21 January 2015: V6.8 : Auto-Ident Update
25 March 2016: V6.9 C. Margescu Updates to SW5.2: $9341 DTC update
31 January 2017: V7 L.Mujdei Auto-Ident Update 31 January 2017: V8 L.Mujdei Auto-Ident Update 31 January 2017: V8 L.Mujdei Auto-Ident Update + application on X07ph2

Data.Name: OutputTemporaryControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Data.Name: Session Name
Data.Comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range/zero adjust.failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Switch_ADAS.Button
Data.Comment: Switch Front Collision Warning (FCW) current state

Data.Name: Switch_ADAS.Button_pressed
Data.Comment: Switch Front Collision Warning (FCW) to know if already pressed since start

Data.Name: LID_ VIN_ CRC
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LID_ VIN_ V I N
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: RDBLID CANVMUX message set ref
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-V

Data.Name: RDBLID Record local ID
Data.Comment: identifies a predifined group of data tobe returned to the tool

Data.Name: ECU Configuration.Transmission
Data.Comment: Indicate if transmission is Manuel gearbox or Automatic gearbox

Data.Name: ECU Configuration.Output feedback function present
Data.Comment: If the Front Collision Warning (FCW) switch not present, not need to activate DTC on status LED

Data.Name: OutputLines.LED_feedback_function
Data.Comment: status of LED feedback function line

Data.Name: ECU Configuration.EngineType
Data.Comment: Indicate if moteur is EV or ICE

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: IOControl.ExtONLine
Request.Comment: Request for input level simulation NOT USED FOR ADAS INSULATOR

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress
Request.Comment: RAM memory in the following address range: from 0xFFFFB000 to 0xFFFFF000.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier: Daimler ID Frame
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier: Daimler Identification Frame, needed for the double referencement

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Label.Text: The well diagnostic session is automatically choosen for each screens. This screen permits only to check if the ECU answers correctly for each diagnostic session.
